overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit downtown district. The player navigates past holographic billboards, crosses busy intersections, and walks along streets lined with towering digital advertisements in a futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath holographic billboard

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk beneath a massive cylindrical holographic billboard structure

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structure with multiple rotating holographic advertisements suspended above the street
rows of bright yellow benches lining the left side of the walkway
illuminated 'Night City' sign on the facade of a modern building ahead
tall skyscraper with reflective glass windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive cylindrical holographic billboard. Yellow benches line the left side while futuristic glass towers rise in the background. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza and street intersection with palm tree planters

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with palm tree planters
crossing the wet street at a major intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street at a major intersection, navigating around palm tree planters in the plaza

entered.detail: modern commercial building with prominent Night City signage and glass entrance
large planters containing palm trees and spiky plants arranged along the plaza
older brick building with multiple windows contrasting with modern structures
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian signals at the intersection

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into an open plaza with palm trees and modern planters. The character crosses a wet asphalt intersection with visible crosswalk markings, passing by the Night City building while traffic signals and distant vehicles are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial street with heavy digital advertising

events.description: red sports car drives past on the right side of the street
turning right to follow the curve of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street curb past illuminated billboards and moving traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: building facade covered with multiple stories of large digital advertisements and movie posters
bright red neon signage with 'RED' text visible on the right side of the street
large glowing green diamond-shaped holographic advertisement suspended above the street
elevated roadway or monorail track passing above the street level

segments.scene_description: Walking along a multi-lane street lined with massive vertical digital billboards and neon signs. The wet road reflects the colorful advertisements as vehicles drive past. A prominent green diamond-shaped hologram and red neon signage illuminate the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crossing and digital kiosks

events.description: crossing the street at yellow-striped crosswalk
passing close to pedestrian with umbrella briefly blocking view

agents.ego_description: navigating across intersections and approaching pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person holding black umbrella walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall digital pillar displaying green text and advertisements on the sidewalk
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
large planter containing tropical foliage and broad-leaf plants

segments.scene_description: Crossing a busy intersection with yellow-striped crosswalk markings while navigating around other pedestrians. The area features digital information pillars and tropical plant planters. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks past as the character continues through the neon-lit downtown area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic downtown district. It begins beneath a massive cylindrical holographic billboard along a covered walkway, where yellow benches and glass towers are mirrored in the wet pavement. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide plaza with palm trees and modern planters before crossing a rain-slicked asphalt intersection toward the Night City building. The movement then shifts along a multi-lane street lined with towering vertical digital billboards, where a green diamond-shaped hologram and red neon signs cast vibrant reflections across the road. Finally, the camera navigates through a busy intersection filled with digital information pillars and pedestrians with umbrellas, weaving through yellow-striped crosswalks under the glow of the city's advertisements.
